title: Formidulus
body:
# Formidulus The Current Release is more of a proof of concept; I plan on expanding on it a lot more in the future.
Release Trailer
## Content The Current Release of the mod contains - 1 Challenging Soulslike Boss - An OST made by [Efefski](https://www.youtube.com/@efefski) - Items with special Abilities - 2 Weapons - 1 Support Item - 2 Decorative Blocks - 2 Cosmetic Equipment pieces - 1 Structure - 1 Banner Pattern ## Dependencies Only Fabric API is required to run Formidulus
Trinkets is required for some features, doesn't have to be installed tho
ModMenu is (as always) Recommended ## Note - This Mod is Balanced around Netherite Armor; in other words, it's intended to be End-Game or Post-Endgame Content. - The Worlds Difficulty Affects the Behavior and Stats of both Bosses and its Minions - This Mod uses **YayConfig**; to Change Server//World Settings easily, use the command `/yayConfig formidulus:world`
